GRADUATION: 2027 batch | CGPA: 8.15

TECHNICAL SKILLS:
Java, JavaScript, C++, C, Python, Spring Boot, Node js, Express js, Docker, MySQL, PostgreSQL, Mongo DB, React js, Html, CSS, Rust, GSAP, Three JS, Swing, Streamlit

COMPETITIVE PROGRAMMING:
LeetCode:  rating, 14 badges problems solved
CodeChef: 


KEY PROJECTS:
- CODELENS: A distributed AI-as-a-Service application using React, Java Spring Boot, and PostgreSQL, integrating Gemini/Ollama for automated codebase analysis. Stack: Spring Boot, React, SQL, Python. Custom File-Walker algorithm; RESTful pipeline
- E-Commerce Backend System: A scalable backend system for an E-Commerce platform using Spring Boot and Java. Stack: Java, Spring Boot, PostgreSQL, Rest Api. RESTful APIs; Layered architecture

WORK EXPERIENCE:
- Java Intern at Data Alchemy PVT LTP (18 Feb 2026 - Current): Engineered robust and high-performance backend applications using Java and Spring Boot.
- SAP Intern at Excel Controlinkage PVT LTP (21 June 2025 - 21 July 2025): Gained hands-on experience in SAP MM and ABAP.

ACHIEVEMENTS: Runner-up in SVPCET Hackathon; Finalist of Central India Hackathon; Led a team in Smart India Hackathon
HACKATHONS: SVPCET Hackathon (Runner-up); Central India Hackathon (Finalist); Smart India Hackathon ()
PUBLICATIONS: 

TARGET ROLES (priority order, derived from resume evidence): Software Engineer, Full Stack Developer, Backend Engineer
TARGET COMPANIES: no explicit preference — any reputable tech company
PREFERRED LOCATIONS: Nagpur, Remote India

ROLE TYPE EXCLUSIONS (this candidate wants HANDS-ON ENGINEERING work, NOT these):
AI content writing, prompt engineering for content/marketing, AI marketing/copywriting roles, non-technical AI trainer roles, data annotation without engineering component

HARD VETOES (auto-disqualify, each tied to resume evidence):
